/usr/bin/g++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/atomix.dir/atomix_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atomix.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atomix.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atomix.dir/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atomix.dir/GWidget.cpp.o -o atomix  -Wl,-rpath,/home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib /home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.5.3 /home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.5.3 /home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /home/braer/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
